description_long: This house features a modern, geometric design with a prominent dark gray gable roof and a central raised section, possibly for skylighting or ventilation. The front facade is characterized by large glass panels and a recessed entryway, flanked by blue-framed windows and doors. The side elevation displays a mix of white plaster and stone cladding, with a series of vertically aligned windows and doors, adding texture and visual interest. The rear of the house mirrors the front with a similar gable roof and large window arrangement, but lacks a visible entry. The roof overhangs provide shade and architectural depth, while the overall structure sits on a low, solid base. The materials and clean lines suggest a contemporary urban residence designed for both style and functionality.
description: A modern house with a dark gable roof, large glass panels, and a mix of white and stone exterior walls. The design features clean lines, blue-framed windows, and a central raised roof section.
description_view_0: Front view showing a large gable roof, glass panels, and a recessed entryway with blue-framed windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the mix of white and stone cladding, multiple windows and doors, and the central raised roof section.
description_view_2: Rear view with a similar gable roof and large window arrangement, but no visible entryway.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing a plain white wall with minimal openings and the central raised roof section.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large glass panels
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed entryway with large glass panels, blue-framed door, and roof overhang
